This task belongs entirely in the `<agent>frontend_developer_worker</agent>` archetype's lane, regardless of how complete or well-structured the dispatch brief is.

**Suggested archetype**

`<agent>frontend_developer_worker</agent>` — this archetype specializes in user-interface implementation, component-contract preservation, user-facing behavior verification, and frontend-backend integration touchpoint reasoning. All of the dispatched work (React components, Redux Toolkit on the client, responsive breakpoints, WebSocket UI integration, React Testing Library) falls precisely within that archetype's scope.

**Acceptance criteria**

- Designing the API endpoints that the dashboard frontend will call
- Defining the database schema for dashboard data persistence
- Implementing server-side WebSocket handling or message queue integration
- Auditing an existing backend implementation for feasibility or false positives

With the current scope — full React component hierarchy, Redux Toolkit on the client, responsive CSS breakpoints, and frontend testing — I cannot accept it.

**Confirmation**

No code, files, or artifacts have been modified. No work has been performed. The write boundary was not entered.","time":{"start":1775687016508,"end":1775687016508}}}
